instructions_for_codex: CNS-021 iter-1 PARTIAL verdin (7 blocking + 10 warning, ready_for_impl=false). Plan v2 yazıldı — revision history §0'da. 7 blocker + 10 warning absorbe edildi. MUTLAKA OKU: .claude/plans/PR-A2-IMPLEMENTATION-PLAN.md (v2, 665 satır, §0 Revision History v1→v2). İter-1 response: .ao/consultations/responses/CNS-20260415-021.codex.response.v1.json. Micro-verification mode (CNS-018/019/020 iter-2 pattern): NB1-NB9 fix verdicts, her biri plan v2 line-ref + grep kanıtıyla doğrula. Yeni blocker varsa ekle; yoksa `ready_for_impl: true` aç. Yanıt TEK JSON obje, kompakt.

question.title: PR-A2 plan v2 micro-verification — iter-1'den 7 blocker + 10 warning fix
question.body:
## Bağlam

İter-1: 7 blocking + 10 warning + PARTIAL + ready_for_impl=false + next_iteration_required=true.

Plan v1 → v2 revizyonu (`.claude/plans/PR-A2-IMPLEMENTATION-PLAN.md:§0`):

**7 blocker fix:**
- B1 (Q1) workflow-definition closed contract → `additionalProperties:false` top-level + step_def + her nested yer; `expected_adapter_refs`/`adapter_id` pattern `^[a-z][a-z0-9-]{2,63}$` + uniqueItems:true.
- B2 (Q1) Cross-ref enforcement → integration test acceptance'ı fail-closed cross-ref doğrular; PR-A3 executor resmi tüketici docstring.
- B3 (Q3) versionless intent resolution → explicit 'highest SemVer across bundled+workspace; same-key precedence only'; intent rule entry'de opsiyonel `workflow_version` alan.
- B4 (Q4) no-match semantic → `error_on_no_match`→None, `use_default`→default non-null (conditional schema), `llm_fallback`→NotImplementedError; `__default__` sentinel matched_rule_id.
- B5 (Q4) duplicate rule_id → loader-level explicit check + `IntentRulesCorruptedError(reason='duplicate_rule_id')`; schema + loader kombinasyonu.
- B6 (Q5) filename dash match → fixtures dash-named (codex-stub, gh-cli-pr, claude-code-cli); `expected_id = filename.stem.removesuffix('.manifest.v1')`; mismatch normalization yapmaz.
- B7 (Q5) CrossRefIssue structured type → `list[CrossRefIssue(kind, workflow_id, step_name, adapter_id, missing_capabilities)]`; `missing_capabilities(adapter_id, required) -> frozenset[str]` helper.

**10 warning fix:**
- W1 pattern drift regression test
- W2 step timeout vs run-level budget: `effective_deadline = min(step_timeout, remaining_budget)` + error.category mapping (timeout vs budget_exhausted) schema description
- W3 retry_once semantic: 'exactly one immediate retry, no backoff, same input envelope' description
- W4 custom escape hatch eklenmedi (FAZ-D #9 ayrı); 3 enum kapalı
- W5 workspace 0.9 vs bundled 1.0 audit: 'source precedence only same key; cross-source highest SemVer wins' doc
- W6 `duplicate_id` → `duplicate_workflow_key` rename (reason enum)
- W7 keyword ASCII word-boundary: `\b<keyword>\b` with re.IGNORECASE; Unicode follows Python re.UNICODE default; example table docs
- W8 `[llm]` ABC/Protocol PR-A2'de değil; PR-A6'da extension
- W9 Adapter LoadReport reason taxonomy genişledi: json_decode, schema_invalid, adapter_id_mismatch, read_error, not_an_object, duplicate_adapter_id
- W10 test target 110-140 (40% artış); fixture count 9 (cli happy + http happy + 4 negative + 2 duplicate + claude-code-cli + custom-http)

## 9 Micro-Verification Sorusu

### NB1 — B1 workflow-definition closed contract fix?
Plan v2 §4: `additionalProperties:false` top-level ve `$defs/step_def`'te explicit mi? `expected_adapter_refs` items `^[a-z][a-z0-9-]{2,63}$` + uniqueItems:true? Her nested policy/capability yapısında kapalı?

### NB2 — B2 Cross-ref enforcement acceptance fix?
Plan v2 §11 integration test fail-closed CrossRefIssue acceptance net mi? §15 Post-PR-A2 PR-A3 executor docstring contract referansı var mı? `validate_cross_refs` opt-in ama acceptance gate net mi?

### NB3 — B3 versionless resolution fix?
Plan v2 §5 intent rule entry'de opsiyonel `workflow_version` alan mı? §6 `get(id, version=None)` docstring 'highest SemVer across bundled+workspace; source precedence only when keys identical' explicit mi? SemVer comparator yerel (packaging/semver runtime dep eklenmemiş) mi?

### NB4 — B4 no-match contract fix?
Plan v2 §5 + §8 üç fallback_strategy her biri için davranış net mi? `error_on_no_match`→None, `use_default`→`default_workflow_id` non-null conditional schema + `__default__` sentinel result, `llm_fallback`→NotImplementedError explicit?

### NB5 — B5 duplicate rule_id fix?
Plan v2 §5 + §8 loader-level duplicate rule_id check + `IntentRulesCorruptedError(reason='duplicate_rule_id')`? Regex compile fail için ayrı reason (`regex_compile`)? Duplicate priority match için runtime reason (`duplicate_priority_match`)?

### NB6 — B6 fixture dash fix?
Plan v2 §11 fixture listesi dash-named (`codex-stub.manifest.v1.json`, `gh-cli-pr.manifest.v1.json`, `claude-code-cli.manifest.v1.json`)? Filename strict `expected_id = stem.removesuffix('.manifest.v1')` vs `raw['adapter_id']` exact compare, no normalization explicit?

### NB7 — B7 CrossRefIssue structured type fix?
Plan v2 §6 `CrossRefIssue(kind, workflow_id, step_name, adapter_id, missing_capabilities)` dataclass tanımlı mı? `validate_cross_refs` dönüş tipi `list[CrossRefIssue]`? `missing_capabilities(adapter_id, required) -> frozenset[str]` helper eklendi mi §7?

### NB8 — 10 warning fix (grouped)?
W1-W10 hepsi plan v2'de absorbe edildi mi (drift test, step timeout vs budget, retry_once semantic, custom eklenmemiş, workspace 0.9 audit, duplicate_workflow_key rename, ASCII word-boundary, [llm] ABC yok, adapter LoadReport 6-reason taxonomy, test target 110-140)?

### NB9 — Yeni blocker / ready_for_impl / PR split?
Plan v2'de yeni blocker var mı? PR-A2 tek PR kabul edilebilir mi yoksa split önerir misin? `ready_for_impl: true`? CNS-021 iter-3 gerekli mi?

## Yanıt Formatı

```json
{
  "version": "v1",
  "consultation_id": "CNS-20260415-021",
  "status": "ANSWERED",
  "iteration": 2,
  "from_agent": "codex",
  "to_agent": "claude",
  "overall_verdict": "AGREE|PARTIAL|DISAGREE",
  "rationale": "<120 kelime",
  "micro_fix_verdicts": [
    {"id": "NB1", "fixed": true|false, "note": "..."},
    {"id": "NB2", "fixed": true|false, "note": "..."},
    {"id": "NB3", "fixed": true|false, "note": "..."},
    {"id": "NB4", "fixed": true|false, "note": "..."},
    {"id": "NB5", "fixed": true|false, "note": "..."},
    {"id": "NB6", "fixed": true|false, "note": "..."},
    {"id": "NB7", "fixed": true|false, "note": "..."},
    {"id": "NB8", "fixed": true|false, "note": "..."},
    {"id": "NB9", "fixed": true|false, "note": "..."}
  ],
  "new_blocking_objections": [],
  "residual_warnings": ["..."],
  "ready_for_impl": true|false,
  "next_iteration_required": true|false,
  "pr_split_recommendation": "single_pr|other",
  "created_at": "2026-04-15T...+03:00",

}
```
